root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type, sc_mem_edit_bank.pre_bank_id as bf_bank_id, pka_com_function.fp_form(sc_mem_edit_bank.pre_bank_acc_no,'XXX-X-XXXXX-X') as bf_bank_acc_no, sc_mem_edit_bank.pre_atm_lon as bf_atm_lon, sc_mem_edit_bank.bank_id as af_bank_id, pka_com_function.fp_form(sc_mem_edit_bank.bank_acc_no,'XXX-X-XXXXX-X') as af_bank_acc_no, sc_mem_edit_bank.atm_lon as af_atm_lon, sc_mem_edit_bank.entry_id as edit_id, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_edit_bank.entry_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy hh24:mi:ss') as entry_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as memname, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(current_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as sysdate_tdate
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_edit_bank
WHERE trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) = trim(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no) and trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) = trim(sc_mem_edit_bank.membership_no) and (sc_mem_edit_bank.entry_date)::date between '!entry_date_1!' and '!entry_date_2!'
/*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
